title: Fiwano – Unified API for WhatsApp, Instagram DM and Facebook Messenger
abstract:
Hi all! Wanna share you my project, which was born from my own pain.

If you build AI assistant, some CRM or any automation, which should be accessible via WA/IG/FB direct messages - you know, that intecrating this channels is quite painful. I tried to make it much easier - with Fiwano yo
abstract_zh: 嘿伙计们！我有个大新闻要分享，因为我自己的头疼事，造出了个神器——Fiwano。你是不是经常被WhatsApp、Instagram DM和Facebook Messenger的整合搞蒙圈？别怕，有了Fiwano，统一API帮你一键打通这些小秘境，再也不用在各个App间跳来跳去，省心省力！痛并快乐着，现在终于可以“统一”快乐了！
